blended.narrative: Okemo is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.5 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 509 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 2.2" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Thursday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
